description_long: This is a classic diner-style booth lounge set featuring two high-backed, curved benches facing each other across a rectangular table. The benches are upholstered in a deep red, slightly worn leather or vinyl with visible wear patterns, and are framed by wooden side panels with a natural finish. The table has a matching red patterned surface and is supported by a single central metal pedestal base. The seating is generously padded, with seat and back cushions integrated into the bench structure. The entire set is mounted on a rectangular section of worn, grayish flooring, suggesting placement in a public or commercial space. The overall design evokes a retro or vintage urban diner aesthetic, suitable for cafes, restaurants, or communal urban environments.
description: A retro diner booth set with two red cushioned benches and a matching table, framed by wood and set on a worn floor. The benches feature high, curved backs and integrated padding, creating a classic urban lounge look.
description_view_0: Rear view of one bench, showing the curved wooden back panel and the top of the red cushioned backrest.
description_view_1: Frontal view of the booth set, displaying both benches, the patterned table, and the worn floor section.
description_view_2: Rear view of the opposite bench, mirroring the curved wooden back and red upholstery.
description_view_3: Angled front view, highlighting the seating arrangement, table, and the distressed texture of the upholstery.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two tall back cushions, all attached and integrated into the benches, with no loose or separate cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: High, curved backrests with a continuous, smooth surface and no visible tufting or segmentation; the backrests are fully upholstered and extend the full width of each bench.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests present; benches have open sides.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible; benches and table appear to have solid bases or are directly mounted to the floor section.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid red with visible wear and a subtle diamond pattern on the tabletop; no tufting or decorative stitching is apparent.
